import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
  mut sum = 0
  mut count = 0
  let n = tokens.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let tok = tokens.get(i).ok_or("missing token")?
    let v = string.parse_int(tok).ok_or("invalid integer")?
    sum = sum + v
    count = count + 1
    i = i + 1
  end
  if count == 0
    Err("no input")
  else
    let avg = sum / count
    print("avg=#{avg}")
    Ok(())
  end
end
